summary: Iteration 43 - Revenue Export (CSV/PDF) and Auto-Notification Testing. All 22 backend tests passed. All frontend UI elements verified and working correctly. Export dropdown with CSV and PDF options functional. Notification system creates royalty_update notifications on import.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions when page first loads - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality (same as iteration 42)

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/analytics/revenue/export/csv returns 200
Backend: CSV export has text/csv content-type
Backend: CSV export contains 'Kalmori Distribution — Personal Earnings Report' header
Backend: CSV export contains 'Artist:' field with artist name
Backend: CSV export contains 'Generated:' date field
Backend: CSV export contains 'Plan:' information
Backend: CSV export contains '=== STREAMING EARNINGS ===' section with platform breakdown
Backend: CSV export contains '=== KALMORI DISTRIBUTION EARNINGS ===' section
Backend: CSV export contains footer 'This report was generated by Kalmori Distribution'
Backend: GET /api/analytics/revenue/export/pdf returns 200
Backend: PDF export has application/pdf content-type
Backend: PDF export is valid PDF file (starts with %PDF magic bytes)
Backend: PDF export has Content-Disposition header for download
Backend: CSV export requires authentication (401 without auth)
Backend: PDF export requires authentication (401 without auth)
Backend: GET /api/notifications returns 200
Backend: royalty_update notification exists with message 'New earnings of $2.00 have been added to your account via Kalmori Distribution.'
Backend: Notifications have required fields (id, type, message, read, created_at)
Backend: GET /api/analytics/revenue returns 200 (regression)
Backend: Revenue analytics has summary section (regression)
Backend: Revenue analytics has kalmori section (regression)
Backend: Revenue analytics has combined section (regression)
Frontend: Revenue Analytics page loads at /revenue
Frontend: Export Report dropdown button visible with data-testid='export-btn'
Frontend: Download CSV option visible with data-testid='export-csv-btn'
Frontend: Download PDF option visible with data-testid='export-pdf-btn'
Frontend: All 3 tabs present (Overview, Kalmori Earnings, Calculator)
Frontend: Summary cards show correct combined data ($344.95 Total Earnings, $14.79 Streaming Revenue, $330.16 Kalmori Earnings, $344.95 Your Take)
Frontend: Kalmori Distribution Active badge appears
Frontend: Overview tab - Monthly Revenue Trend chart renders
Frontend: Overview tab - Streaming Earnings by Platform chart and table render
Frontend: Kalmori Earnings tab - Kalmori Distribution branded header with Bank icon
Frontend: Kalmori Earnings tab - Summary stats show $330.16 Total Revenue, $330.16 Your Take (100% split), 82,539 Streams, 45 Reports Processed
Frontend: Kalmori Earnings tab - Platform breakdown table with Platform, Streams, Revenue, Your Take columns
Frontend: Calculator tab - What-If Revenue Calculator header present
Frontend: Calculator tab - Total Streams input with default 10000
Frontend: Calculator tab - Platform Mix inputs (Spotify, Apple Music, YouTube Music, Amazon Music, Other)
Frontend: Calculator tab - Calculate Earnings button works
critical_code_review_comments: CSV export correctly includes Kalmori Distribution branding throughout
CSV export has proper sections: header, streaming earnings, kalmori distribution earnings, combined total, footer
PDF export generates valid PDF with reportlab library
Export endpoints properly require authentication (401 without auth)
Notification system creates royalty_update notifications with correct message format including earnings amount and Kalmori Distribution mention
Export dropdown uses <a> tags linking directly to API endpoints (browser sends cookies automatically)
data-testid attributes present on all export-related elements for testing
seed_data_creation: Admin user has 45 Kalmori entries (imported_royalties) worth $330.16 and streaming events worth $14.79. A royalty_update notification exists from a previous $2.00 import.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 43 tested the Revenue Export (CSV/PDF) feature and auto-notification system. The Revenue Analytics page at /revenue has an Export Report dropdown with Download CSV and Download PDF options. CSV export includes Kalmori Distribution branding, streaming earnings section, kalmori distribution earnings section, and combined totals. PDF export generates valid PDF files. The notification system creates royalty_update notifications when admin imports royalty data - verified by finding notification with message 'New earnings of $2.00 have been added to your account via Kalmori Distribution.' All export endpoints require authentication (401 without auth). The admin user has $330.16 in Kalmori earnings and $14.79 in streaming revenue.

mocked_apis.note: No mocked APIs. All endpoints are fully functional with real MongoDB data.

auto_notification_system.message_format: New earnings of ${amount} have been added to your account via Kalmori Distribution.
auto_notification_system.email_notification: Attempted (may fail due to Resend domain restrictions)

export_ui.implementation: Uses <a> tags linking to API endpoints (browser sends cookies)
